description: You are a music editor at a record label. Create a 'Radio Edit' of the extended club mix located at /home/ga/Audio/radio_edit_raw/extended_mix.wav within the 'Radio_Edit_Project' Ardour session. Remove the instrumental bridge between 1:30 and 2:45, ensuring the remaining sections are joined without a gap. Rename the audio track to 'Radio Edit' and export the final arrangement to /home/ga/Audio/delivery/radio_edit_master.wav. Save the session.
